styles.name: Nature / Science Journal
styles.depth_mechanism: Numbered Figure/Table boxes break text into scannable captioned units

styles.name: arXiv Preprint / LaTeX
styles.depth_mechanism: Equation and theorem/definition boxes; rigor over decoration

styles.name: Technical Textbook Spread
styles.depth_mechanism: Tinted worked-example boxes carry real numbers through to a result
best_for: learning a method step by step

styles.name: Editorial Data-Journalism
styles.depth_mechanism: Polished well-labeled charts carry the argument

styles.name: The Economist
styles.depth_mechanism: Disciplined multi-chart grid, each chart titled and sourced

styles.name: NYT / Bloomberg Modern
styles.depth_mechanism: A large hero chart with direct on-line labels leads the eye
